name_cn:
Top-tier factory, complete packaging
【Horizontal Lady D-Joy】Milky white leather mini💯
Brand new Lady D-Joy bag, many people have been attracted by this narrow version of the Lady D-Joy. A massive hit 🔥, the bag comes with a long and a short shoulder strap, multiple carrying styles 🙋🏻‍♀️, can be crossbody or underarm, looks beautiful and chic when worn. Classic quilted design 🥅, paired with soft lambskin for an elegant and stylish look 🌿
Model: 9230
Size: 16*5.5*10cm
